ed_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"open_issues":64,"closed_issues":174,"state":"open","created_at":"2024-05-14T14:03:11Z","updated_at":"2024-10-15T15:49:45Z","due_on":null,"closed_at":null},"comments":1,"created_at":"2024-10-15T15:47:50Z","updated_at":"2024-10-15T16:12:42Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"draft":false,"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/pulls/19001","html_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/19001","diff_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/19001.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/19001.patch","merged_at":null},"body":"This fix addresses the random crashes of k8s jobs in Galaxy: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy-helm/issues/490 and mentioned therein. The issue is that k8s job status may not be ready, while providing already some information: 
https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.30/#jobstatus-v1-batch

In the previous code `if len(job.obj["status"]) == 0:` checked whether some information is there; if yes, treat it as "final" state of the job and continue processing. In the case that the job status has the field `uncountedTerminatedPods`, k8s is not done with analyzing whether the job failed or succeeded. The code then used this information (for me 0 succeeded, 0 active and 0 failed) and went through the decision tree to decide what to do.  

My suggestion is to instead wait for k8s to determine the status of the terminated pods and only then decide what to do. This reduced the failure rate from 2-5% to 0% :)

## How to test the changes?
- [x] Instructions for manual testing are as follows:
  1. The change is difficult to test. It covers an edge where a/ the job is completed, b/ k8s has yet to determine the status of the job. For me 2-5% of jobs fail without the fix.

workflows that don't have runtime non-data parameters that need to be set by the user, we now display the simplified workflow form, which is great!
If a user selects some input data for the workflow and then clicks on "Expand to full workflow form", all selected inputs are reset to the default (last dataset that matches the required datatypes in the history). This can result in extra work to select data again, or (worse) in the workflow being run with the wrong data if the user doesn't notice the change before submitting.

Affects 20.09, 21.01 and dev branches.

![out-2](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/4924623/104629771-d5137180-5691-11eb-94bd-280ef772c14f.gif)
